title: Horizon Serviceability Engine
business_context: Centralised Azure-based serviceability calculation engine replacing fragmented Excel and online banking calculators. Provides consistent credit policy enforcement across all Horizon Bank brands and broker channels.
scope_inclusions: Centralised rules engine; Admin UI; Broker-facing calculator UI; Online banking integration; API publication
scope_exclusions: Legacy BSC decommission (separate project); Mobile app integration (Phase 2)
scope_backlog: Save/retrieve broker calculations; Credit policy simulation tool
mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Broker[Broker Portal] --> AFD[Azure Front Door]
  POL[Online Banking] --> AFD
  AFD --> APIM[Azure APIM]
  APIM --> SVC[Serviceability Engine\nAzure Functions]
  SVC --> DB[(Azure SQL\nRules Engine)]
  SVC --> KV[Key Vault]
  AdminUI[Admin UI] --> APIM
  APIM --> MON[Azure Monitor]
mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Broker->>AFD: Submit serviceability request
  AFD->>APIM: Forward (WAF validated)
  APIM->>SVC: Invoke calculation API
  SVC->>DB: Fetch current credit policy rules
  DB-->>SVC: Policy rules returned
  SVC->>SVC: Execute serviceability calculation
  SVC-->>APIM: Return calculation result
  APIM-->>Broker: JSON response with servicing capacity
target_disposition_rationale: Strategic platform — continues to evolve with credit policy changes

title: Horizon Open Banking CDR Platform
business_context: Consumer Data Right (CDR) data holder capability enabling accredited third parties to access Horizon Bank customer banking data via BIZA-registered APIs. Required for ACCC CDR compliance.
scope_inclusions: BIZA CDR Register integration; Azure Entra CDR auth server; APIM CDR API gateway; Consent management; CDS Banking APIs v1.31
scope_exclusions: Energy sector CDR; Business banking CDR (Phase 2)
mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Consumer --> DR[Accredited DR App]
  DR --> BIZA[BIZA CDR Register]
  DR --> AFD[Azure Front Door]
  AFD --> APIM[Azure APIM]
  APIM --> Entra[Entra External ID\nCDR Auth Server]
  APIM --> CDR[CDR API Functions]
  CDR --> SQL[(Azure SQL\nCDR Cache)]
  CDR --> Cosmos[(Cosmos DB\nConsent Store)]
  CDR --> Core[Core Banking]
mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  DR->>BIZA: Validate accreditation (SSA)
  DR->>AFD: PAR + consent request (MTLS)
  AFD->>APIM: Route request
  APIM->>Entra: OIDC auth flow
  Entra->>Consumer: Redirect to bank login
  Consumer->>Entra: Authenticate and grant consent
  Entra-->>DR: Issue access token
  DR->>APIM: CDR API call (Bearer token)
  APIM->>CDR: Invoke CDR handler
  CDR->>Core: Fetch customer data
  CDR-->>DR: Return CDR response

title: Architecture as Data — Intelligence Platform
business_context: Replaces legacy EA repository as the enterprise architecture system of record. Architecture knowledge captured as structured schema. AI agents handle intake and generation. Live estate intelligence for CTO and board.
scope_inclusions: Dataverse schema; Copilot Studio intake agent; Generation agent; Power Automate flows; Confluence publish; Mermaid diagram generation; Power BI estate dashboard
scope_exclusions: Legacy EA tool decommission (follows PoC validation); Visio licence retirement
scope_backlog: Lifecycle agent; Insights agent; Ingestion agent
mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Arch[Architect] --> Teams[Microsoft Teams]
  Teams --> Intake[Intake Agent\nCopilot Studio]
  Intake --> DV[(Dataverse\nSolution Record)]
  DV --> PA[Power Automate]
  PA --> Gen[Generation Agent]
  Gen --> DV
  PA --> Conf[Confluence Page]
  PA --> PBI[Power BI Dashboard]
mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Architect->>Intake Agent: Initiates intake in Teams
  Intake Agent->>Architect: Structured interview questions
  Architect->>Intake Agent: Provides answers
  Intake Agent->>Dataverse: Write solution_record
  Dataverse->>Power Automate: Trigger on intake_complete
  Power Automate->>Generation Agent: Request HLSO draft
  Generation Agent->>Dataverse: Write draft and Mermaid markup
  Power Automate->>Confluence: Publish HLSO page
  Architect->>Confluence: Review and refine draft

title: Broker Portal — New Experience
business_context: Modern Azure-hosted broker portal replacing the legacy Siebel-based broker interface. Provides loan submission, tracking, and serviceability access for accredited brokers across both Horizon Bank brands.
scope_inclusions: Broker authentication; Loan submission; Application tracking; Serviceability calculator integration; Document upload

graph LR

  AFD->>Entra: OIDC authentication
  Entra-->>Broker: Access token
  Broker->>APIM: Submit loan application
  APIM->>LOS: Create application
  LOS->>Pega: Initiate workflow

title: Enterprise Data Hub
business_context: Centralised Snowflake-based data platform replacing fragmented on-premises data warehouses. Enables AI/ML workloads, regulatory reporting, and cross-brand analytics for Horizon Bank.
scope_inclusions: Snowflake cloud DW; Azure Data Factory ingestion; Power BI reporting layer; Data governance catalogue
scope_backlog: Data mesh domain ownership; Feature store for ML
mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Core[Core Banking\nTemenos] --> ADF[Azure Data Factory]
  CRM[Salesforce CRM] --> ADF
  Lending[Pega Lending] --> ADF
  ADF --> Snow[(Snowflake\nEnterprise DH)]
  Snow --> PBI[Power BI]
  Snow --> ML[ML Workbench]
  Snow --> Reg[Regulatory Reporting]
mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Core Banking->>ADF: Nightly extract (CDC)
  Salesforce->>ADF: Daily sync
  ADF->>Snowflake: Load and transform
  Snowflake->>Power BI: Refresh datasets
  Analyst->>Power BI: Query dashboards
  Power BI-->>Analyst: Return results
data_residency: Australia East (GCP/Snowflake) — data residency exception approved
target_disposition_rationale: Central intelligence platform for the enterprise

title: Customer Identity Platform
business_context: Unified customer identity and access management across all Horizon Bank digital channels using Azure Entra External ID. Replaces fragmented brand-specific identity stores across Coastal and Summit brands.
scope_inclusions: Azure Entra External ID; MFA; OIDC/OAuth2; Cross-brand SSO; Migration of Coastal and Summit identities
scope_exclusions: Staff identity (separate Entra ID tenant); Wholesale banking
mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Coastal[Coastal Online Banking] --> Entra[Azure Entra\nExternal ID]
  Summit[Summit Digital] --> Entra
  Broker[Broker Portal] --> Entra
  CDR[CDR Auth Server] --> Entra
  Entra --> IdStore[(Identity Store)]
  Entra --> MFA[MFA Provider]
  Entra --> KV[Key Vault]
mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Customer->>Coastal Portal: Login request
  Coastal Portal->>Entra: OIDC authorize
  Entra->>Customer: MFA challenge
  Customer->>Entra: MFA verified
  Entra-->>Coastal Portal: ID token and access token
  Coastal Portal->>API: Authenticated request
  API-->>Customer: Personalised content
target_disposition_rationale: Foundation identity platform — all channels depend on it

title: Payments Modernisation — Real-Time NPP
business_context: New Payments Platform (NPP) infrastructure uplift to support PayTo and Osko for retail and business customers across both Horizon Bank brands. Required for RBA NPP mandate compliance.
scope_inclusions: PayTo mandate initiation; Osko overlay; NPP gateway integration; Core banking adapter
scope_exclusions: International payments; Batch direct entry replacement
mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Customer --> OB[Online Banking]
  OB --> APIM[Azure APIM]
  APIM --> PaySvc[Payments Service\nAzure Functions]
  PaySvc --> Core[Temenos Transact]
  PaySvc --> NPP[NPP Gateway]
  NPP --> RBA[RBA Fast Settlement]
  PaySvc --> SB[Azure Service Bus]
  SB --> Notif[Notification Service]
mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Customer->>Online Banking: Initiate PayTo payment
  Online Banking->>APIM: Payment request
  APIM->>PaySvc: Process payment
  PaySvc->>Core: Debit source account
  PaySvc->>NPP: Submit to NPP gateway
  NPP->>RBA: Fast settle
  RBA-->>NPP: Settlement confirmation
  NPP-->>PaySvc: Payment confirmed
  PaySvc->>SB: Publish payment event
  SB->>Notif: Trigger customer notification

title: Fraud Detection AI Engine
business_context: Real-time ML-based transaction fraud detection replacing the legacy rule-based system. Reduces false positives by 40% while improving fraud catch rate using Azure ML and streaming analytics.
scope_inclusions: Azure ML model training pipeline; Real-time scoring via Azure Functions; Case management integration; Model monitoring dashboard
mermaid_component:
graph LR
  TxnStream[Transaction Stream] --> EG[Azure Event Grid]
  EG --> Score[Scoring Function\nAzure Functions]
  Score --> Model[Azure ML\nFraud Model]
  Score --> Rules[Rules Engine]
  Score --> Case[Case Management]
  Model --> Monitor[Model Monitor\nAzure Monitor]
  Case --> Analyst[Fraud Analyst]
mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Core Banking->>Event Grid: Transaction event
  Event Grid->>Scoring Function: Invoke scorer
  Scoring Function->>Azure ML: Score transaction
  Azure ML-->>Scoring Function: Fraud probability
  Scoring Function->>Rules Engine: Apply business rules
  Rules Engine-->>Scoring Function: Decision
  Scoring Function->>Case Mgmt: Create case if fraud
  Case Mgmt->>Analyst: Alert notification
